option.locale.help: CLI locale. Supported: en-US, zh-CN. Can also use XINGYU_ALIGN_LOCALE.
command.models.help: Inspect local model metadata. No downloads are performed.
command.models.list.help: List known model slots and their implementation status.
command.models.status.help: Show whether required model files are available locally.
command.models.pull.help: Explicitly download/preheat the Chinese alignment model.
command.config.help: Inspect or update saved user preferences.
command.align.help: Align trusted lyric lines directly with local WhisperX CTC.
command.version.help: Show the installed Xingyu Lyrics Aligner version.
command.update.help: Print or run the recommended package upgrade command.
command.candidate.help: Generate and review ASR candidate lyrics. Outputs are not trusted lyrics.
command.candidate.extract.help: Extract ASR candidate lyrics from local song audio.
command.candidate.normalize.help: Create a script-normalized copy of candidate lyrics.
option.audio.help: Path to the trusted input audio file.
option.lyrics.help: Path to the trusted lyrics text file.
option.output_dir.help: Directory for alignment.json, lyrics.lrc, and report.json.
option.device.help: Device strategy: auto, cpu, cuda, or mps.
option.language.help: Lyrics language hint, for example zh.
option.lrc_offset_ms.help: LRC export offset in milliseconds; does not change alignment.json.
option.debug_output.help: Reserve debug outputs for local inspection.
option.update_run.help: Actually run the upgrade command. Without this, only prints the command.
option.update_candidate_lyrics.help: Include optional candidate-lyrics dependencies in the upgrade command.
option.candidate_skip_separation.help: Skip Demucs and transcribe the original mixed audio directly.
option.candidate_no_vad.help: Disable faster-whisper VAD. VAD is enabled by default.
option.candidate_condition_on_previous_t: Allow ASR to condition on previous text. Disabled by default to reduce hallucinated continuations.
option.candidate_keep_suspected_metadata: Keep suspected credit/subtitle metadata in transcript.cleaned.txt.
option.candidate_keep_intermediates.help: Keep intermediate files such as vocals.wav. Candidate extraction keeps vocals.wav by default.
option.candidate_normalize_input.help: Input candidate lyric file, for example transcript.cleaned.txt.
option.candidate_normalize_target.help: Target Chinese script: zh-Hans or zh-Hant.
option.candidate_normalize_output_name.h: Output file name. Defaults to transcript.cleaned.zh-Hans.txt or zh-Hant.
doctor.title: Xingyu Lyrics Aligner doctor
doctor.summary.ready: CLI runtime checks completed. Alignment models must be installed or cached locally.
models.list.title: Known model slots
models.status.title: Local model status
models.none_installed: No model files are bundled. Alignment uses locally installed or cached model files.
models.pull.notice: Preparing the WhisperX Chinese CTC alignment model. No ASR transcription will run.
models.pull.size_notice: Download size is determined by upstream model files and may be large.
models.pull.mps_fallback: MPS was requested; WhisperX alignment may use CPU fallback.
config.title: User preferences
models.slot.status.placeholder: metadata only; local availability is checked at runtime
update.dry_run_notice: Dry run only. Rerun with --run to execute it.
update.failed: Upgrade command failed with exit code {code}.
candidate.not_trusted: This is ASR candidate lyrics only; it is not trusted lyrics.
candidate.normalize.source_preserved: The source candidate lyric file was not overwritten.
candidate.normalize.invalid_target: Unsupported target script: {target}. Supported: zh-Hans, zh-Hant.
error.unsupported_locale: Unsupported locale '{locale}'. Falling back to en-US.
